# External Template Structure - Candidate Profile

## Purpose
Define the structure used by staffing firms to summarize candidate readiness and fit.

## Source Pattern References
- Staffing firm profile-card conventions.

## Canonical Sections
1. Candidate summary and target roles.
2. Target geographies and work model constraints.
3. Verified skill inventory.
4. Confidence map (`confirmed`, `probable`, `unknown`, `gap`).
5. Availability and compensation preferences.
6. Risk notes and recommended positioning.

## Usage Guidance
Use as profile-structure reference; map all claims to evidence before presenting to client or recruiter.
